title: Battle for the Eclipse
content:

II Assault Frigates]] *[[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigates]] *[[Marauder-class Assault Corvette/Legends|''Marauder''-class]] [[missile cruiser]]s *[[DP20 gunship/Legends|DP20 frigates]] *[[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] *1 [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] **[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] *[[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]] |forces4= |casual1=*[[Annihilator (Executor-class)/Legends|''Annihilator'']] *All forces in battle except the [[Eclipse (Eclipse-class)|''Eclipse'']] *An [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] and an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] were destroyed early in the battle by the inbound Rebel Fleet |casual2=Unknown, likely moderate to major |casual3=Almost all forces in the battle except some few ships and the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|With the Emperor dead, the Empire will be in chaos. Most of the ships from the Kuat blockade will have returned from the battle over Endor to regroup. The time to strike is now! We must take control of the Eclipse.|[[Tyber Zann]]|}} The '''Battle for the ''Eclipse''''' was a three-way battle between the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] over the planet [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]], a headquarters for many shipbuilding yards. ==Background== {{Quote|The Emperor, and Vader - they're dead. The Rebels must have destroyed them…''"
"''The Rebels claim it to be true, they are broadcasting it all over the holonet.|[[Silri]] and [[Urai Fen]]|}} [[Tyber Zann]] and his criminal [[Zann Consortium/Legends|consortium]] arrived with a private fleet in the [[Kuat system/Legends|Kuat system]] intent on taking advantage of the chaos following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] and the steady disintegration of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], by boarding the [[Eclipse-class dreadnought|''Eclipse''-class dreadnought]] and accessing secret information stored in its vaults. ==The battle== {{Quote|What the... Super Star Destroyer incoming, sir!|A Consortium thug informing Zann of the Annihilator's arrival|audio=Annihilator-FoC.flac|}} The Consortium fleet encountered a rebel fleet wanting to raid the system to destabilize the Empire's fleet production. Tyber Zann, when hailed by the fleet, claimed that they wished to join the Rebel Alliance due to hearing of their victory at Endor. Han Solo then requested his aid in destroying the ''Eclipse'', promising to reward him and his fleet greatly if they succeed. Zann then suggested that they destroy three [[Cardan V-class space station|''Cardan V''-class space stations]] guarding the ''Eclipse'' if they were to reach it. Solo also warned him that if he even suspected that Zann will double-cross them, he wouldn't waste any time taking him out, before wishing him luck. The rebel's initial fleet consisted of 4 [[MC80 Liberty Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 ''Liberty'' type Star Cruisers]], 2 [[Assault Frigate Mark II/Legends|Mk. II Assault Frigates]], 2 [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigates]], 3 [[DP20 gunship/Legends|DP20 frigates]], 1 [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]], the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], and a large number of fighters. They brought in more ships as reinforcements were needed. However, this truce was broken when Zann's forces double-crossed the rebels and captured the [[Eclipse (Eclipse-class)|''Eclipse'']], as the rebels sought to destroy it. Although they were confronted with both a rebel fleet and the local Imperial defense fleet, the Consortium pushed onwards, all the while performing an infiltration and takeover of the half-complete ''Eclipse''. [[File:Star-wars-empire-at-war-forces-of-corruption-20061024035411691.jpg|thumb|left|220px|Kuat under attack]] Utilizing the semi-stable [[Superlaser/Legends|superlaser]] cannon of the ''Eclipse'', Zann's forces gained the upper hand. They then focused on destroying the ''Millennium Falcon''. The ''Millennium Falcon'' was severely damaged. After a few shots from the ''Eclipse'', the superlaser broke down. This was followed immediately by the arrival of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gaarn]], who commanded the [[Star Dreadnought/Legends|Star Dreadnought]] [[Annihilator (Executor-class)/Legends|''Annihilator'']]. At this point, it seemed as though the fight would swing in the Empire's favor. However, the Consortium brought in more reinforcements, and eventually managed to destroy the ''Annihilator''. Shortly afterward, the Consortium team aboard the ''Eclipse'' managed to repair the superlaser, used it to mop up the rest of the Imperials and rebels. The Consortium emerged victorious in the end, but at the cost of many lives and ships on all three sides. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|I've no need to keep the half-constructed Eclipse. And it presents a target even the Rebels couldn't miss. With the treasures from Palpatine's vaults, I can now spread my organization across the galaxy. Let the rebels form their New Republic! I've always wanted to own a senator…|Tyber Zann|}} Having found information about Palpatine's vaults in the ''Eclipse''{{'s}} databanks, Zann decided he had no need to take over the vessel, as it was too big a target for the Galactic Empire and Rebel Alliance to ignore. Tyber announced his plans to spread his organization galaxy-wide using the credits in the vaults, and decided to let the Alliance form the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], having always desired to "own a senator." The Empire reclaimed the ''Eclipse'' and later completed it. Elsewhere on the Eclipse, Silri utilized the holocron that was [[Raid on the Imperial Archive|stolen]] from the [[Imperial Archives (museum)/Legends|Imperial Archives]] and vowed to "teach Zann what true power really is" and accessed a map of the galaxy. ==Behind the scenes== A bug in the game ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' sometimes results in the ''Millennium Falcon'' being destroyed during the battle, rather than retreating. The trigger for the Eclipse's superlaser breaking down along with the ''Annihilator's'' arrival is completing both of the objectives for driving away the Falcon and destroying the three [[Cardan V-class space station|''Cardan V''-class space stations]]. If one of the objectives is not met, the superlaser can be fired as many times as the player wills before the objectives are cleared. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion'': Prima Official Game Guide]] {{1stID|Battle for the ''Eclipse''}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW Ssi-Uprising}} {{Interlang |de=Schlacht von Kuat (4 NSY) |es=Batalla por el Eclipse |uk=Битва за «Затемнення» }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Eclipse, Battle for the}} [[Category:Battles of Kuat]] [[Category:Battles of the Galactic Civil War]]
